regime_fall.current_status: Supreme Leader Khamenei was killed on March 1, triggering establishment of a Provisional Leadership Council (Pezeshkian, Mohseni-Ejei, Arafi) to hold interim power while a new Supreme Leader is selected. A two-week US-Iran ceasefire holds amid ongoing negotiations in Islamabad, but tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz closure, with the IRGC consolidating power and hardliners like Parliament Speaker Qalibaf emerging as key power brokers.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed on March 1, 2026, during the opening phase of the 40-day US-Iran conflict, prompting formation of a Provisional Leadership Council and destabilizing Iran's succession structure.
